author: Robert Kiyosaki
visual_theme: Luxury vs hustle: golden-hour business photography. Marble lobbies, rooftop terraces, suits, sports cars contrasted with cluttered cubicles, late-night laptops, drained faces. Warm gold highlights, deep navy shadows.

slides.headline: Two dads. Two money mindsets.
slides.image_prompt: Cinematic photo of a confident middle-aged man in a tailored navy suit standing in his sunlit corner office, hand resting on a glass desk, calm self-assured expression, Manhattan skyline soft-focus behind him, golden-hour warm light. Medium shot from waist up. Vertical portrait 9:16, photorealistic, hyperreal, cinematic, anatomically correct natural human proportions, no distortion, no elongation, no stretched limbs or bodies, no tall thin figures, sharp focus, professional photography, no text, no captions, no signage.
slides.voiceover: Robert Kiyosaki had two dads with two completely opposite money mindsets.

slides.headline: Your house isn't an asset. It's eating your paycheck.
slides.image_prompt: Cinematic photo of a tired couple in their thirties seated at their kitchen table at night, scattered bills and a calculator in front of them, harsh overhead light, drained worried expressions, modest suburban kitchen in soft focus. Chest-up framing. Vertical portrait 9:16, photorealistic, hyperreal, cinematic, anatomically correct natural human proportions, no distortion, no elongation, no stretched limbs or bodies, no tall thin figures, sharp focus, professional photography, no text, no captions, no signage.
slides.voiceover: Most people think their house is an asset. It's actually a liability.

slides.headline: The middle class works for money. Rich people make money work.
slides.image_prompt: Cinematic photo of a calm businessman in his forties seated at a polished glass desk in a high-rise office, tablet in hand showing rising charts, Manhattan skyline behind him, golden-hour warm sunlight, confident relaxed expression. Medium shot from waist up. Vertical portrait 9:16, photorealistic, hyperreal, cinematic, anatomically correct natural human proportions, no distortion, no elongation, no stretched limbs or bodies, no tall thin figures, sharp focus, professional photography, no text, no captions, no signage.
slides.voiceover: The middle class trades hours for dollars. The rich build assets that pay them.

slides.headline: Read Rich Dad Poor Dad. Rewrite your money story.
slides.image_prompt: Cinematic photo of the book Rich Dad Poor Dad standing upright on a polished wooden desk, warm desk lamp casting golden light, leather chair and Manhattan skyline soft-focus through a window behind it, dusk lighting. Medium close-up product shot. Vertical portrait 9:16, photorealistic, hyperreal, cinematic, sharp focus, professional photography, no text, no captions, no signage.
slides.voiceover: Read Rich Dad Poor Dad by Robert Kiyosaki. It will change how you see money.
